title: Filesystem server scoped to a home directory is BLOCK

origin.description: Public documentation config from modelcontextprotocol/servers (src/filesystem/README.md (NPX)). Unmodified snippet; placeholders such as <YOUR_TOKEN> are upstream's own.

humanExpectation.rationale: Granting a filesystem server a broad home-anchored path (/Users/username/Desktop) lets an agent read and write far beyond a project, which is a blocking risk; the unpinned package compounds it.
knownLimitations: The exact reachable tree depends on the running user's home directory at run time.
